JwtSettings._comment_SecretKey: IMPORTANT: Override this value via environment variable JwtSettings__SecretKey or user secrets in production.

OpenAI._comment_ApiKey: Set in Planora/appsettings.Local.json or via environment variable OpenAI__ApiKey.
OpenAI._comment_BaseUrl: Override via OpenAI__BaseUrl if you use a different OpenAI-compatible provider.

EmailSettings._comment_SmtpHost: Override via EmailSettings__SmtpHost env var or user secrets.
EmailSettings._comment_SmtpUsername: Set via EmailSettings__SmtpUsername env var or user secrets.
EmailSettings._comment_SmtpPassword: Set via EmailSettings__SmtpPassword env var or user secrets.
EmailSettings._comment_SenderEmail: Set via EmailSettings__SenderEmail env var or user secrets.
